[{"role":"assistant","parts":[{"type":"text","content":"Sounds gucci. I went trace-by-trace through the real March execution windows and validated against the raw Tempo payloads, not just search results. The raw data does not currently show full coverage.

There are also parent chat traces that mention March analysis folders but are not direct per-analysis subagent trees, mainly `c5989fa1a5a41d7f2f7e229e45d4f99e` and `7fefb70bee48cd36ac94407a12cf54a0`. Using raw pre-debug Tempo payloads, that gives:

Why I’m confident those nine are missing from Tempo: their output files were written between `2026-04-10 21:59 -0700` and `2026-04-10 22:45 -0700`, but Tempo returns zero traces for that exact UTC block (`2026-04-11 04:50Z` to `06:10Z`) in all four cases:
